banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Priya Anjali Sharma, an Indian national and visa national (must obtain a Standard Visitor visa rather than an ETA), applying to visit her sister in Manchester for a two-week family visit, self-funded from her own savings and salary as an employed software engineer in Bengaluru. She has no criminal record, no prior UK visa refusals, and no immigration-law breaches. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to apply: an Indian national who is a visa national (not ETA-eligible), intends to leave the UK at the end of a short family visit, has sufficient self-funded resources for the trip and return travel, and is not seeking UK residence through repeated visits.

reasons.requirement: Must be a visa national requiring this visa rather than an ETA or visa-free entry
reasons.sourceRef: Overview — 'You can check if you need a visa before you apply'

reasons.requirement: Must intend to leave the UK at the end of the visit (Appendix V, paragraph V4.2)
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — "you'll leave the UK at the end of your visit"

reasons.requirement: Must be able to support the visit and pay for return/onward travel
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility requirements — 'you can support yourself and any dependants during your trip'; 'you can pay for your return or onward journey'

reasons.requirement: Must not be seeking UK residence through frequent or successive visits
reasons.sourceRef: Visit: caseworker guidance — not 'making the UK their home through frequent and successive visits'

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: no second address line for this applicant's address
applicant has no spouse or partner
hasCriminalConvictions, previouslyBreachedUkImmigrationLaw, and previouslyRefusedUkVisaOrEntry are all false

documentsProvided.reason: a mock current Indian passport (P1234567, issued 2022-03-15, expiring 2032-03-14) is provided
fundingSource is self; 6 months of bank statements from a mock HDFC Bank account showing salary credits and savings balance, plus an employer salary certificate, are provided
employmentStatus is employed; a mock employer letter from Nimbus Software Pvt Ltd on company letterhead confirming role, salary, and approved leave dates is provided
not gated by any field; mock copies of two previous passports' bio-data pages showing France/UAE/Thailand travel stamps are provided, consistent with countriesVisitedInLast10Years

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (gb/ukvi/standard-visitor-visa). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to UK Visas and Immigration, the Home Office, or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, submit the actual online application themselves, and attend the biometric appointment at a Visa Application Centre with the original supporting documents before this application can proceed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
